motivational_cards.title: Embrace the Grind
motivational_cards.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.

motivational_cards.title: Power Through
motivational_cards.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivational_cards.action: Keep pushing forward, even when it's tough.

motivational_cards.title: Balance is Key
motivational_cards.quote: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.

plan.productivity_tip: Schedule your breaks as diligently as you schedule your tasks. Short, regular breaks can significantly boost focus and prevent burnout.
